overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character moves from a shadowed underpass into sunlit streets, passing futuristic architecture, neon signs, and pedestrians, eventually crossing a busy intersection with large digital billboards toward a distinctive building with red circular artwork.

passes parked vehicles and continues along sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the shadow of a massive elevated highway structure. As the camera moves forward, it passes the 'meatower' building with its distinctive green neon sign and emerges into bright morning sunlight. Pedestrians walk ahead on the concrete sidewalk while a futuristic sedan drives past on the left.

van drives past on the street to the left

bright yellow building facade visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street under the elevated highway, the camera passes a multi-level parking garage on the left. The environment becomes darker as it enters a more covered section. A yellow commercial building becomes visible in the distance on the right while vehicles pass by on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered commercial walkway with a prominent yellow storefront on the right. As it approaches a major intersection, large digital billboards on an overhead pedestrian bridge come into view. The crowd density increases with various pedestrians including a heavily augmented character visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with digital billboards and distinctive red circular architecture

events.description: crossing the street among group of pedestrians
approaching building with large red circular artwork on facade

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection toward a building with distinctive red circular architecture, navigating through pedestrian traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open intersection bathed in direct sunlight, crossing the street among other pedestrians. Overhead, large digital billboards display advertisements while the camera approaches a distinctive building featuring a massive red circular structure on its facade. The elevated highway and yellow storefront recede into the background as the scene opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of an urban underpass into a wide, sun-drenched city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, passing the green neon sign of the meatower building before emerging briefly into bright morning sunlight alongside pedestrians and a passing futuristic sedan. As the camera continues forward, the environment dips back into shadow beside a multi-level parking garage, eventually leading into a covered commercial walkway dominated by a prominent yellow storefront. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches a major intersection, passing through an increasing crowd of augmented pedestrians toward large digital billboards on an overhead bridge. Finally, the camera emerges into the full glare of direct sunlight, crossing the wide street as the highway and storefront recede to reveal a distinctive building featuring a massive red circular structure on its facade.
